examples: The investigation and analysis were carded out on the distribution and characters of Bombax ceiba in Hainan Province.
They sorted out the data and carded them.
The wool needs to be carded before we dye it.
Yellow-carded companies remain on the list without impact on their ranking until the investigation is resolved.
He reached the turn in just 30 strokes and carded 11 birdies in all.
